title: Expenses of administration
doc_html:
§390.  Expenses of administration

All expenses incidental to the administration of this Chapter shall be paid from the funds of the board of barber examiners in the manner and form governing other expenditures of that board.  

Acts 1964, No. 309, §1.  Acts 1984, No. 238, §1.
doc_text:
§390.  Expenses of administration
All expenses incidental to the administration of this Chapter shall be paid from the funds of the board of barber examiners in the manner and form governing other expenditures of that board.
Acts 1964, No. 309, §1.  Acts 1984, No. 238, §1.
